Campfire.description: A place to cook food and fend the cold away.
Campfire.flavorText: One of the simplest sources of heat available on Icarus, the campfire burns sticks and wood to cook basic foods. Toxins in the planet\'s atmosphere do not interfere with combustion.

Crafting_Bench.description: A sturdy construction bench, though useless without shelter.
Crafting_Bench.flavorText: A heavy woodworking table that enables construction of improved tools, weapons and structural elements.

Carbon_Spear.description: A light, resilient spear made of layered carbon fiber.

Charcoal.flavorText: Slightly lower oxygen levels result in burned carbon forming charcoal naturally.

Copper_Ore.description: Low grade copper ore, can be refined into pure ingots.
Copper_Ore.flavorText: The abundance of raw, high-quality metals on Icarus would have made it a goldmine, were it not so far removed from Earth.

Refined_Copper.description: A pure ingot of copper, humanity\'s first metal.
Refined_Copper.flavorText: Easily worked, readily alloyed, a highly useful material for everything from weaponry to basic electronics.

Cooked_Meat.description: Can be eaten to satisfy hunger.
Cooked_Meat.flavorText: Cooked meat is easier to digest and provides more nutrition than raw flesh.

Concrete_Mix.description: A rudimentary, but serviceable concrete analogue.
Concrete_Mix.flavorText: Invented almost 8000 years ago, the composition of concrete has always varied depending on available resources and needs. Never was this more true than on Icarus.

Copper_Bolt.description: Lightweight and strong, the copper bolt hits hard over distance.

Crossbow.description: Heavy hitting with a slow reload, so make it count.
Crossbow.flavorText: \'The first time I held a crossbow, I was confused. How can you feel powerful and so medieval at the same time?\' -- Anton Chang

Concrete_Furnace.description: An insulated, high-temperature furnace for smelting a wide range of materials including steel.
Concrete_Furnace.flavorText: Icarus\'s oxygen levels may slow combustion, but ceramic insulation produces temperatures sufficient for smelting more advanced alloys.

Concrete_Furnace_V2.description: An insulated, high-temperature furnace for smelting a wide range of materials including steel.
Concrete_Furnace_V2.flavorText: Icarus\'s oxygen levels may slow combustion, but ceramic insulation produces temperatures sufficient for smelting more advanced alloys.

Carbon_Fiber.description: A lightweight, flexible construction material with high tensile strength.

Carbon_Paste.description: A carbon-based admixture used in advanced constructions.

Composites.description: An extremely strong, light and endurant construction material.

Combat_Knife.description: A hardened sheepsfoot blade for the swiftest killing and skinning.

Carbon_Arrow.description: Strength and lightness combined in one hard-hitting package.

Composite_Arrow.description: For power and weight, nothing compares.

Composite_Spear.description: Low weight, high strength, extreme damage.
Composite_Spear.flavorText: Bringing two thousand years of materials technology to a sharp stick, the composite spear is lethal at long range or close quarters.

Cooking_Station.description: A food preparation and butchering bench.
Cooking_Station.flavorText: While it may not deliver high cuisine, the Cooking Station rewards the attentions of an attentive chef with a swifter, more sustaining food supply.

Cooking_Station_V2.description: A food preparation and butchering bench.
Cooking_Station_V2.flavorText: While it may not deliver high cuisine, the Cooking Station rewards the attentions of an attentive chef with a swifter, more sustaining food supply.

Concrete_Floor.description: Strong and stable, a floor that endures the worst Icarus can deliver.

Concrete_Frame.description: The strongest, most stable foundation for any structure.

Concrete_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Concrete_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Concrete_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Concrete_Ramp.description: A high strength slope, supports great weight.

Composite_Chest.description: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
Composite_Chest.flavorText: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

Carpentry_Bench.description: Workbench and tools for advanced wooden crafting.
Carpentry_Bench.flavorText: The rapid growth of trees on Icarus makes for noticeably less durable wooden creations.

Fireplace_Chimney_Ext.flavorText: \'Sometimes it felt like I had joined a rustic interior decoration cult\' - M. Le Baroni

Fireplace_Chimney_Cap.description: The final step in a fireplace.

Fireplace_Chimney_Cap_Half.description: The final half-sized step in a fireplace.

Cloth_Head.description: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

Cloth_Chest.description: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

Cloth_Legs.description: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

Cloth_Arms.description: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

Cloth_Feet.description: Light and easily craftable, offering low protection and decent insulation.

Concrete_Wall_Angle.description: Moulded inserts for gables and other angular constructions.

Charcoal_From_Wood.flavorText: Slightly lower oxygen levels result in burned carbon forming charcoal naturally.

Composite_Arms.description: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
Composite_Arms.flavorText: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

Composite_Head.description: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
Composite_Head.flavorText: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

Composite_Feet.description: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
Composite_Feet.flavorText: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

Composite_Legs.description: Heavy HDP armor with unmatched impact protection and insulation.
Composite_Legs.flavorText: Employing ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastics, composite armor trades weight for extraordinary protection against physical damage and exposure.

Coal_Ore.description: A readily combustible, energy dense ore.
Coal_Ore.flavorText: Composed of ancient carbon-based plant matter, the combination of exotics and Icarus\'s tumultuous geophysics forms coal much faster than on Earth.

Meta_Coal.description: A high density petrochemical material refined from cometary hydrocarbons.
Meta_Coal.flavorText: Comets are formed from material that never became planets, let alone stars. Burning it\'s the next best thing.

Meta_Coal_x100.description: A readily combustible, energy dense ore.
Meta_Coal_x100.flavorText: Composed of ancient carbon-based plant matter, the combination of exotics and Icarus\'s tumultuous geophysics forms coal much faster than on Earth.

Concrete_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for extremely high building.
Concrete_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor. Increasing the quantity of beams at lower levels will increase build height even further.

Cement_Mixer.flavorText: Concrete is composed of two essential elements: aggregate and a cement binder, with ratios depending on the specific design mix. Specialized concrete engineers are rare on Icarus, though.

Rug_Cougar.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Cougar_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Cougar.
Cougar_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Corn.flavorText: Cook or cultivate this ancient cereal, humanity\'s most widely produced grain.

Crushed_Bone.flavorText: Highly ground bone creates a useful ingredient for a range of concoctions.

Caveworm_Knife.flavorText: Evolved to resist prolonged sand abrasion, the worm\'s chitin-analogue scales holds an excellent edge.

Caveworm_Spear.description: A spear crafted from an ancient organism\'s armor.
Caveworm_Spear.flavorText: Many factions continue to research these worms, suspecting that subterranean evolution could hold clues to the bioeffects of exotics.

Caveworm_Arrow.flavorText: While the worms\' existence inside the terrazone is a mystery, their scales make extraordinarily practical blades

Caveworm_Bow.description: A hard-won trophy turned into a weapon
Caveworm_Bow.flavorText: Still smells a little strange though

Carrot.description: A carrot, like many before it.

Cooked_Corn.description: Grilled to perfection, depending on your standards.
Cooked_Corn.flavorText: A source of fuel for humans, animals and machines alike.

Creamed_Corn.description: Pureed corn, animal fat and water, easy to digest.
Creamed_Corn.flavorText: Slow release energy with a baby-food consistency, boosting health and stamina.

Crumbed_Fish.description: Battered in breadcrumbs, lightly fried, boosts health and stamina.

Chemistry_Bench.flavorText: Unlikely to win anyone a Nobel Prize, but sufficient for the average Icarus alchemist.

Coffee.flavorText: Humanity was never going to last long in Icarus without it.

Basic_Bandolier.description: A wearable ammo store, reducing firearms weight and reload speed.

Meta_Corn_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Corn Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Carrot_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Carrot Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Giant_Steak_Cooked.description: A prime cut from the larger beasts

Gamey_Meat_Cooked.description: A reasonably well cooked piece of meat

Soft_Meat_Cooked.description: A wonderfully soft piece of meat

Stringy_Meat_Cooked.flavorText: Get your revenge on those pesky wolves

White_Meat_Cooked.description: A slightly overcooked piece of meat

Cooked_Bacon.description: A delicately thin slice of meat

Bandage_Cooling.description: A bandage with a soothing balm to quickly lower temperatures. Treats heatstroke and heat exhaustion.

Scanner_Cave.description: A scanner that can locate caves within the surrounding area. Right click to toggle audible beeping.
Scanner_Cave.flavorText: Making life easier, one piece of technology at a time.

Meta_Carbon_Armor_Helmet_Beta.description: The latest technology, designed to assist with mining and felling.
Meta_Carbon_Armor_Helmet_Beta.flavorText: The perfect companion for any aspiring miner or lumberjack.

Meta_Carbon_Armor_Chest_Beta.description: The latest technology designed to assist with mining and felling.

Meta_Carbon_Armor_Arms_Beta.description: The latest technology designed to assist with mining and felling.
Meta_Carbon_Armor_Arms_Beta.flavorText: You\'ll find you can lift more with this set.

Meta_Carbon_Armor_Legs_Beta.description: The latest technology designed to assist with mining and felling.
Meta_Carbon_Armor_Legs_Beta.flavorText: Never skip leg day, unless you have these to help.

Meta_Carbon_Armor_Feet_Beta.description: The latest technology designed to assist with mining and felling.
Meta_Carbon_Armor_Feet_Beta.flavorText: The toughest boots on the orbital market.

Mission_CaveWormEgg.description: An egg snatched from a caveworm nest.

Condensed_Enzymes.description: Condensed Enzymes Extracted from an Enzyme Geyser
Condensed_Enzymes.flavorText: I\'m sure there is a use for this.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Containment.flavorText: Preventing mortal injury to prospectors is good for the bottom line.

Knife_Attachment_Bone_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of bone from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Bone_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Copper_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Copper from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Copper_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Arms_Attachment_Tool_Use_1.description: An attachment that reduces the stamina used for tool actions and the durability loss of tools.
Arms_Attachment_Tool_Use_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to hands armor at an Alteration Bench.

Hard_Leather_Head.description: Headgear, providing some insulation and damage protection.

Hard_Leather_Chest.description: A basic cuirass, gives limited insulation and damage protection

Hard_Leather_Feet.description: Roughly made boots, increase temperature and damage resistance.

Hard_Leather_Arms.description: Gauntlets, providing basic protection and insulation.

Hard_Leather_Legs.description: Simple chausses, improving insulation and damage resistance.

Advanced_Leather.description: Treated leather for a more durable prospector protection solution.

Clay.description: A mouldable, fine-grained material that can be baked into bricks.
Clay.flavorText: Also a popular medium for artists.

Clay_Brick.description: A solid and reliable tool for building strong structures.

Clay_Brick_Floor.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Wall.description: A well-constructed base for your base.
Clay_Brick_Wall.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Wall_Angle.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Ramp.description: A solid option for any construction.
Clay_Brick_Ramp.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Beam.description: A beam that provides both style and function.
Clay_Brick_Beam.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Roof_Corner.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Roof_Half_Pitch.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Clay_Brick_Halfpiece.description: A homely half-piece for your walls.
Clay_Brick_Halfpiece.flavorText: There are four main elements of clay on Earth, who knows what\'s on Icarus?

Advanced_Leather_Process.description: Treated leather in the process of drying.
Advanced_Leather_Process.flavorText: Given time this leather will be able to be put to good use.

Caveworm_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Evolved to resist prolonged sand abrasion, the worm\'s chitin-analogue scales holds an excellent edge.

Carbon_Throwing_Spear.description: A light, resilient spear made of layered carbon fiber.

Composite_Throwing_Spear.description: Low weight, high strength, extreme damage.
Composite_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: Bringing two thousand years of materials technology to a sharp stick, the composite spear is lethal at long range or close quarters.

Caveworm_Throwing_Spear.description: A spear crafted from an ancient organism\'s armor.
Caveworm_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: Many factions continue to research these worms, suspecting that subterranean evolution could hold clues to the bioeffects of exotics.

Cooked_Potato.description: Improves stamina and keeps you fuller for longer.

Dropship_Grenade_T4.description: Once thrown if the landing area is determined to be valid, will call your dropship to your current location.
Dropship_Grenade_T4.flavorText: Made on planet with the materials at hand, lets hope it works.

Fish_01_Var3.description: A common freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_01_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_03_Var2.description: A common saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_03_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_03_Var3.description: A common saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_03_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_04.description: A common saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_04.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_05_Var2.description: An uncommon saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_05_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_05_Var4.description: An uncommon saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_05_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_06_Var2.description: An uncommon saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_06_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_10_Var3.description: A rare freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_10_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_11_Var3.description: A rare saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_11_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_12.description: An uncommon saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_12.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_12_Var2.description: An uncommon saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_12_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_13_Var2.description: A rare saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_13_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_14_Var4.description: A rare freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_14_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_18_Var3.description: An uncommon, saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_18_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_18_Var4.description: An uncommon, saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_18_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_19.description: A common, freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_19.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Cured_Leather_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted out of leather, to attract more fish.
Cured_Leather_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Copper_Wire.description: This wire can be used in Electrical Circuits

Carved_Table_Round.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Table_6Seater.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Table_10Seater.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Chair_Dining.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Chair_Living.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Chair_2Seater.description: A finely crafted couch for two people.
Carved_Chair_2Seater.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Chair_3Seater.description: A finely crafted couch for three people.
Carved_Chair_3Seater.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Sitting_Bench.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Wall_Shelf.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Display_Cabinet.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Wardrobe.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Narrow_Wardrobe.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Candle.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Dresser.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Stool.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Nightstand.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Bookshelf.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Bed.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Coffee_Table.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Carved_Desk_Lamp.flavorText: Carving wood by hand is a time-consuming process that requires a great deal of skill and patience.

Geode_Lamp_Cut_Copper.description: A gorgeous raw geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Cut_Copper.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Burst_Copper.description: A gorgeous cluster geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Burst_Copper.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Monolith_Copper.description: A gorgeous monolith geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Monolith_Copper.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Crumbed_Saltwater_Fillet.description: A crispy and savory dish made by coating tender fillets of fish in breadcrumbs and frying until golden brown.
Crumbed_Saltwater_Fillet.flavorText: Crispy on the outside, fishy on the inside.

Shield_Carbon.description: A lightweight yet durable shield made from advanced carbon, providing excellent protection without weighing you down.
Shield_Carbon.flavorText: With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.

Shield_Composite.description: A versatile shield made from a blend of high-tech materials, providing adaptable protection against a variety of threats.
Shield_Composite.flavorText: With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.

Painting_Dark.description: A portrait painting on canvas with a charcoal frame.
Painting_Dark.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Cold_Steel_Ingot.description: Formed by melding a Steel Ingot with Super Cooled Ice.
Cold_Steel_Ingot.flavorText: Do not allow direct contact with skin.

Cold_Steel_Axe.description: A sturdy Axe crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus. Wood collected with this Axe will burn for longer.
Cold_Steel_Axe.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Pickaxe.description: A sturdy Pickaxe crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus. Gives a chance to collect Frozen Ore on impact.
Cold_Steel_Pickaxe.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Knife.description: A sturdy Knife crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus. Meat harvested with this knife will take more time to spoil.
Cold_Steel_Knife.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Spear.description: A sturdy Spear crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus.
Cold_Steel_Spear.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Sickle.description: A sturdy Sickle crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus. Plants harvested with this sickle will take more time to spoil.
Cold_Steel_Sickle.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Sledgehammer.description: A sturdy Hammer crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus. Gives a chance to collect Frozen Ore on impact.
Cold_Steel_Sledgehammer.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Bolt.description: A sturdy Bolt crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus.
Cold_Steel_Bolt.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Arrow.description: A sturdy Arrow crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus.
Cold_Steel_Arrow.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Throwing_Knife.description: A sturdy Throwing Knife crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus.
Cold_Steel_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Cold_Steel_Throwing_Spear.description: An aerodynamic spear crafted using Cold Steel, unique to Icarus.
Cold_Steel_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: One of the few tools that are only available on Icarus, due to the nature of the materials required.

Raw_Iron_Wood.description: A delicate substance often found coating creatures that inhabit swampy areas of Icarus.
Raw_Iron_Wood.flavorText: Exotics have been shown to warp and twist DNA on a molecular level, it would seem no living thing is safe.

Meta_Cocao_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Cocoa Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming.

Meta_Coffee_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Coffee Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Copper_Ore_Stack_100.description: Low grade copper ore, can be refined into pure ingots.
Copper_Ore_Stack_100.flavorText: The abundance of raw, high-quality metals on Icarus would have made it a goldmine, were it not so far removed from Earth.

Raw_Wood_Sign.description: A charming sign to display information on.

Farmers_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to cover all your farming needs.
Farmers_Backpack.flavorText: Spray the weeds and keep the seeds

Chefs_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to cover all your cooking needs.

Caveworm_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Caveworm.
Caveworm_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Chamios_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Chamois.
Chamios_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Chala_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Chala.
Chala_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Crocodile_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Crocodile.
Crocodile_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Mission_Device.description: Certified Online Network Transmitter for Contractor Tasking. Allows contact to Orbital station SMPL3 Missions and Operations.
Mission_Device.flavorText: Replacing UDA agents one mission at a time.

Caveworm_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Chamios_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Chala_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Crocodile_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Desert_Mammoth_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Desert_Mammoth_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Columbian Mammoth.
Desert_Mammoth_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_IceMammoth.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with temperature regulation.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_IceMammoth.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Smoked_Fatty_Tbone.description: A large, fatty piece of smoked meat, with a punch of energy.
Smoked_Fatty_Tbone.flavorText: Guaranteed to perk up any prospector.

Smoked_Soft_Meat.description: A piece of sweet smokey meat.
Smoked_Soft_Meat.flavorText: For when you want something sweet but it\'s dinner time.

Saddle_CrocSkin.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount made from fine Crocodile skin.

Meta_Coconut_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Coconut Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Shotgun_CHAC.description: A heavy hitting shotgun, built for creature suppression.
Shotgun_CHAC.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Workshop_Chicken.description: A Chicken preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Sheep.description: A Sheep preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Pistol_CHAC.description: A modern pistol made in the classic 3D printed CHAC style.
Pistol_CHAC.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Rifle_CHAC.description: A modern hunting rifle with fairly quick reloads that deals a decent amount of damage.
Rifle_CHAC.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Workshop_Horse_A1.description: A Horse preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Horse_A2.description: A Horse preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Horse_A3.description: A Horse preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Dog_A1.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Dog_A2.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Dog_B1.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Dog_B2.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Cat_A1.description: A Cat preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Cat_A2.description: A Cat preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Workshop_Cat_A3.description: A Cat preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Cat_Bowl_Food.description: A simple bowl to fill with food for your cat.

Cat_Bowl_Water.description: A simple bowl to fill with water for your cat.
Cat_Bowl_Water.flavorText: A hydrated pet is a happy pet.

Dog_Head_A2.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_A2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Trophy_A2.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Workshop_Dog_C1.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Single_Ceiling_Light.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Charging_Device.description: Charges basic battery powered devices when they are placed inside.

Workshop_Dog_D1.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.
Workshop_Dog_D1.flavorText: It is Laika - Back from space - what a good dog.

Workshop_Dog_D2.description: A Dog preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.
Workshop_Dog_D2.flavorText: It is Laika - Back from space - what a good dog.

Frozen_Kiwi.description: A Kiwi preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Ammo_Crude.description: A very basic ammo type that can only be used by low tier firearms.

Bunker_Window.flavorText: Storms on Icarus can do some damage.

Coconut_Cookie.flavorText: Just like Grandma used to make.

Caramel_Fruit_Tart.description: A scrumptious caramel tart, with berries for added flavour.

Salted_Caramel_Pastry.description: An intricately baked pastry, filled with caramel and topped with salt.

FieldGuide_Character.description: Characters can craft basic equipment necessary for survival.

Workshop_Calf.description: A Calf preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.

Cow_Head.description: What is left of a large friend.

Cow_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_RockGolem.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with cave tolerance, and grants additional stone
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_RockGolem.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Chocolate_Cake.description: A big chocolate cake of 8 pieces. Deploy this to enjoy with friends.
Chocolate_Cake.flavorText: Just like Grandma used to make.

Chocolate_Cake_Piece.description: A piece of chocolate cake, made from scratch on Icarus.
Chocolate_Cake_Piece.flavorText: Just like Grandma used to make.

Carrot_Cake.description: A big carrot cake of 8 pieces. Deploy this to enjoy with friends.
Carrot_Cake.flavorText: Who knew vegetables could taste this great.

Carrot_Cake_Piece.description: A piece of carrot cake, made from scratch on Icarus.
Carrot_Cake_Piece.flavorText: Who knew vegetables could taste this great.

Coconut_Cake.description: A big coconut cake of 8 pieces. Deploy this to enjoy with friends.

Coconut_Cake_Piece.description: A piece of coconut cake, made from scratch on Icarus.

Clay_Stack_100.description: A mouldable, fine-grained material that can be baked into bricks.
Clay_Stack_100.flavorText: Also a popular medium for artists.

Cheese.description: A chunk of cheese, made on Icarus with Soybean as a rennet.
Cheese.flavorText: One of the best human inventions.

Mission_Radio.description: Contacts a nearby C0NT4CT Device to kick off Operations on the go. Will not work if there is no C0NT4CT device placed on the map.
Mission_Radio.flavorText: A truly remarkable piece of equipment.

Cream.description: Fresh cream, cannot be eaten on its own.

Cheese_Roll.flavorText: A classic orginating from the South Island of New Zealand.

Cheese_Pizza.description: The most basic form of pizza that exists.
Cheese_Pizza.flavorText: One of the best culinary inventions.

Calf_Head.description: What is left of a small friend.
Calf_Head.flavorText: Never had the chance to grow up.

Calf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Chick_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Chick_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Cave_Bat_Head.description: What remains of a mutated bat-like creature.
Cave_Bat_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Cave_Bat_Trophy.description: A Trophy of a mutated bat like creature.
Cave_Bat_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

SandArmor_Head.description: Resilient Armor Designed Withstand the Extremely Hot Temperatures and Focus on Survival.
SandArmor_Head.flavorText: Designed on Old Earth to Survive in Extreme Desert Conditions.

SandArmor_Chest.description: Resilient Armor Designed Withstand the Extremely Hot Temperatures and Focus on Survival.

SandArmor_Feet.description: Resilient Armor Designed Withstand the Extremely Hot Temperatures and Focus on Survival.

SandArmor_Arms.description: Resilient Armor Designed Withstand the Extremely Hot Temperatures and Focus on Survival.

SandArmor_Legs.description: Resilient Armor Designed Withstand the Extremely Hot Temperatures and Focus on Survival.

SandArmor_Backpack.description: A powered backpack that emits an aura of fall damage reduction and is made to help protect against exposure. Can be recharged at the Charging Station.

Prop_Container.description: A basic container for storing fluids.

Prop_Cards.description: Something to pass the time on Icarus.

Prop_Cryogenic_Sample_Storage.description: Research canisters super cooled and filled with research samples.

Prop_Clipboard.description: Contains notes on Experiments and Observations.

Prop_Centrifuge.description: A device that spins samples at high speeds to separate substances based on their density

Prop_CleaningSupplies.description: Industrial Strength Cleaning Supplies which can clean almost anything.

CavewormScale_Head.description: Armor made from the Remains of a Caveworm.

CavewormScale_Chest.description: Armor made from the Remains of a Caveworm.

CavewormScale_Arms.description: Armor made from the Remains of a Caveworm.

CavewormScale_Legs.description: Armor made from the Remains of a Caveworm.

CavewormScale_Feet.description: Armor made from the Remains of a Caveworm.

Cooked_Truffle.description: Cooked to enhance its earthy, luxurious flavour.
Cooked_Truffle.flavorText: Earthy notes that whisper of rare indulgence on this side of the system.

Nesting_Box.description: Place an egg into this nest to hatch a chicken egg. Hatching speed will increase if a chicken sits on the egg.

Workshop_Cat_B.description: A Cat preserved in a cryogenic stasis that can be deployed and defrosted on planet.
